title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1018 - Rules — promulgated by the division
text:
454.1018.  Rules — promulgated by the division. — The division shall promulgate rules necessary for the implementation and administration of sections 454.1000 to 454.1025.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated pursuant to the authority of this section shall become effective unless it is promulgated pursuant to section 536.024.
(L. 1997 S.B. 361) 
Effective 7-01-97
